summary: Completed comprehensive frontend UI/UX testing of FitMaster Electric Cyan redesign. Login page and dashboard design are excellent with proper glassmorphism, Bento Grid layout, and Electric Cyan theme implementation. Some session persistence issues detected during navigation testing.

integration_issues.issue: Session persistence issues causing redirects back to login page during navigation

passed_tests: Login page loads with Electric Cyan theme and glassmorphism design
Personal login functionality works with credentials personal.demo@fitmaster.com/demo123
Dashboard displays proper Bento Grid layout with 12 grid elements
Sidebar glassmorphism effects working with backdrop blur
Electric Cyan primary color (183 100% 50%) applied correctly
Barlow Condensed typography applied to headings and stat numbers
Gradient text elements working (3 found including PERSONAL text)
Login form elements have proper data-testid attributes
Dashboard stat cards display correctly (Alunos, Treinos, Progresso)
Welcome message personalizes with user name
Beautiful background gradients and effects working
success_percentage: 85% - UI/UX design is excellent, minor navigation issues
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate session persistence/authentication issues during navigation. The UI design is perfect but users may get redirected to login when navigating between pages, which affects user experience.
